# subagentknowledge.com

> Citation service for researchers and AI agents: 5,401 mirrored vendor docs,
> CSL-JSON citation datasets, and a Kimball warehouse of citation analytics.
> Stable per-citation URLs under /cite/ return one CSL-JSON item each.

## Feeds

- [citations.json](https://subagentknowledge.com/citations.json)
- [vendor-stats.json](https://subagentknowledge.com/vendor-stats.json)
- [team-stats.json](https://subagentknowledge.com/team-stats.json)
- [table-semantics.json](https://subagentknowledge.com/table-semantics.json)
- [memories.json](https://subagentknowledge.com/memories.json)
